历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Physics Category (including former Science) minimum rankings approximately 7294→7442→6240→7273, overall fluctuating in the 6200–7500 range; in 2024, due to changes in exam difficulty, the ranking significantly advanced to 6240, rebounding to 7273 in 2025; the 3-year average is about 6985, with the 2025 baseline around 7273; provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category: 86 in 2022, 84 in 2023, 91 in 2024, 89 in 2025; 2026 plan is 86, a decrease of 3 from 2025 (-3.4%), a slight reduction in enrollment, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking 29th (stable at 28–31 in recent years), a top national normal university; the 2026 reputation file does not include this university, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 28th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.7 million, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, application attention stable; 14 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Education A+, Physical Education A+, Statistics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Psychology A, Mathematics A, Software Engineering A, etc.; the normal and science discipline groups have strong strength, maintaining continuous attraction for high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors such as Computer Science, Statistics, Data Science remains relatively high; total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 2025 (about 463,000); estimated Physics Category candidates about 329,000 based on historical proportion, a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying overall competition; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region; the university's enrollment plan in Sichuan is relatively stable (at the level of 80–90 people), with no significant fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7273, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-3.4%), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province (+15.5%), and the stable reputation of the university, competition is expected to intensify, and the ranking will move forward. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 7076, range 6576–7576.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including original Liberal Arts) was approximately 816 → 804 → 1042 → 1740, showing an overall backward trend. Since 2024, due to the adjustment of the new college entrance examination subject selection model, the ranking has significantly shifted backward. The baseline for 2025 is about 1740. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 38 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 34 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 39, an increase of 5 (+14.7%) compared to 2025, indicating a clear expansion and some relief in competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is a top-tier normal university in China. The 2026 reputation file does not include this university, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 28th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.7 million, indicating a medium-to-high level of application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Education, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in World History, and A in Psychology, which are highly relevant to History Category enrollment majors. The academic strength strongly attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Normal Education, Chinese Language and Literature, and Law have stable to slightly hot social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Sichuan Province general college entrance examination is about 535,000. Estimated by historical proportion, History Category candidates are about 206,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 178,000), indicating a significant increase in candidate scale. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates from the southwestern region. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Sichuan has fluctuated between 34 and 44 in recent years, expanding to 39 in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1740, the 2026 plan expansion (+14.7%), and the significant increase in History Category candidates in Sichuan (+15.7%), the competition is basically balanced with a slight intensification. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1914, with a range of 1684–2144.
